title: MS Global Franchise Portfolio's Top 5 1st-Quarter Buys
text: The MS Global Franchise Portfolio (Trades, Portfolio), part of Morgan Stanley's ( MS , Financial) mutual funds, disclosed in a regulatory filing that its top five buys during the first quarter included new positions in Otis Worldwide Corp. ( OTIS , Financial) and Equifax Inc. ( EFX , Financial) and boosts to its holdings in Nike Inc. ( NKE , Financial), LVMH Moet Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE ( XPAR:MC , Financial) and Danaher Corp. ( DHR , Financial).

title: What Stocks To Buy Today? 3 Consumer Discretionary Stocks In Focus
text: Check out these consumer discretionary names making moves in the stock market today.

title: Nike won't renew franchise agreements in Russia: report
text: Nike has reportedly not renewed franchise agreements in Russia. The athletic clothing brand announced it would temporarily suspend operations at all its Nike-owned and -operated stores there due to Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

title: Nike not renewing franchise agreements in Russia - newspaper
text: U.S. sportswear maker Nike has not renewed agreements with its largest franchisee in Russia, the Vedomosti daily reported on Wednesday, marking the latest exit by a major U.S. brand since Russian forces entered Ukraine.

title: NIKE, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2022 Earnings and Conference Call
text: BEAVERTON, Ore.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) plans to release its fourth quarter fiscal 2022 financial results on Monday, June 27, 2022, at approximately 1:15 p.m. PT, following the close of regular stock market trading hours. Following the news release, NIKE, Inc. management will host a conference call beginning at 2:00 p.m. PT to review results. The conference call will be broadcast live over the Internet and can be accessed at http://investors.nike.com. For those unable to listen to the live broadcast, an archived version will be available at the same location through 9:00 p.m. PT, July 18, 2022. About NIKE, Inc. NIKE, Inc., based near Beaverton, Oregon, is the world's leading designer, marketer and distributor of authentic athletic footwear, apparel, equipment and accessories for a wide variety of sports and fitness activities. Converse, a wholly-owned NIKE, Inc. subsidiary brand, designs, markets and distributes athletic lifestyle footwear, apparel and accessories. For more information, NIKE, Inc.’s earnings releases and other financial information are available on the Internet at http://investors.nike.com. Individuals can also visit http://news.nike.com and follow @NIKE.

title: Nike Is Getting More Attractive
text: Shares of Nike Inc. ( NKE , Financial) have decreased nearly 36% year to date. The stock is also trading 39% off of its 52-week high, placing the company firmly in bear market territory.

title: Why Nike Stock Stumbled to a Nearly 6% Fall Today
text: An analyst's not-very-drastic price target cut and the report of an executive departure come on an inopportune day for the top consumer discretionary company.

title: Why Nike Shares Are Getting Hammered Today
text: Shares of several companies in the retail, including Nike Inc (NYSE: NKE), are trading lower following weak retail earnings this week from Walmart and Target. Anticipation of further Federal Reserve policy tightening has continued to weigh on stocks across sectors.

title: Don't Bet On Footlocker To Rebound After Q1 Earnings
text: While Footlocker (NYSE: FL) could come out and surprise the market on Friday when it reports we aren't going to hold our breaths waiting for share prices to rebound. A number of factors are weighing on share prices and we see those forces driving the stock lower.

title: Nike Alleges Sneaker Marketplace StockX is Selling Fake Shoes
text: Nike is continuing its legal battle with StockX, a sneaker marketplace, alleging that the latter company sold fraudulent shoes, Bloomberg wrote Wednesday (May 11). While StockX promised it only sold legitimate footwear for athletes, Nike claimed it had bought four pairs of counterfeit shoes on the platform.

title: Gear Up for a Dip-Buy as Nike Stock Posts Steep Consecutive Losses
text: Take note of problems brewing in China, but also keep an eye out for value as deeply depressed NKE stock enters the buy zone. The post Gear Up for a Dip-Buy as Nike Stock Posts Steep Consecutive Losses appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Nike Could Fall More From Cash Flow and Excess Inventory Issues
text: Nike's cash flow and excess inventory problems relate to falling consumer demand, which is what is pushing NKE stock lower. The post Nike Could Fall More From Cash Flow and Excess Inventory Issues appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Contribution Of The Jordan Brand To My Buy Rating On The Nike Stock
text: Michael Jordan signed his first contract with the U.S. sporting goods manufacturer Nike back in 1984, when the revenue of Adidas was still 50% larger than that of Nike's. Today, Nike's revenue is 93% higher than the revenue of competitor Adidas.

title: More Than 300 Million Reasons Why Nike Is Dominating Digital
text: Ongoing investments to bolster its technological infrastructure are working for the top apparel business.

title: Nike: Overvalued By Every Metric
text: Being one of the world's best-known brands is not enough to make it worth investing in. By averaging the valuation methods used, Nike's fair value is $94.68, which is quite far from the current $118.

title: High Quality Dividend Growth Near 52-Week Lows: Nike Is Next-Level
text: A watchlist of the highest-quality dividend growth companies is filtered by proximity to 52-week lows. 3M Company, United Parcel Service, Lam Research and Blackrock all appear to be attractively valued based on Historical and Future Fair Valuations.

title: Wall Street is fed up with Under Armour, Nike and Adidas
text: Tripped-up supply chains and a coronavirus surge in China are causing headaches for top athletic brands.

title: Nike's stock in danger of first back-to-back 5%+ drops in 22 years
text: Shares of Nike Inc. NKE, -6.51% dove 6.4% in morning trading, enough to pace the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA, -1.45% decliners, in the wake a disappointing earnings report from Germany-based athletic apparel and gear rival adidas AG ADDYY, -5.67% ADS, -5.75% . Nike's stock was trading at the lowest price seen during regular-session hours since September 2020, while the Dow slumped 425 points, or 1.3%, toward the lowest close since March 2021.

title: Foot Locker to focus more on Adidas as Nike lowers presence
text: Foot Locker Inc is aiming to triple Adidas's sales of sneakers and other items at its stores, as it promotes the products of the German sportswear giant to counter Nike Inc's shrinking presence at the retail chain.

title: NIKE, Inc. Declares $0.305 Quarterly Dividend
text: BEAVERTON, Ore.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.305 per share on the Company’s outstanding Class A and Class B Common Stock payable on July 1, 2022, to shareholders of record at the close of business June 6, 2022. title: 1 Reason to Buy Nike Stock and Hold for Decades
text: The global leader in athletic apparel is a market outperformer that can help investors sleep well at night.
